summary: The implementation covers all core requirements from the BuildRequest. All major features are present: homepage with branding, project posting/browsing with filtering, professional profile creation and directory with filtering, Internet Identity authentication, and construction-themed styling. The diff shows a comprehensive implementation with proper routing, state management, and backend integration.

hallucinated_features.description: User profile system with name, email, and phone fields implemented via ProfileSetupModal and user profile endpoints
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify a user profile system. Requirements focus on project posting and professional profiles, but not general user profiles with contact information

hallucinated_features.description: Project and professional profile deletion functionality
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest does not specify deletion capabilities for projects or professional profiles

hallucinated_features.description: Project update functionality allowing modification of existing projects
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only specifies creation and browsing of projects, not updating existing projects

hallucinated_features.description: Professional profile update functionality allowing modification of existing profiles
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest only specifies creation and browsing of professional profiles, not updating existing profiles
